# Pronunce — Free American English Pronunciation Practice

> Pronunce (pronun.space) is a free, open-source web app for practicing American English pronunciation. It is designed for ESL learners, non-native English speakers, and anyone who wants to improve their American English accent.

## What it does

Pronunce offers interactive pronunciation lessons with:

- **IPA transcription**: Every word shows its International Phonetic Alphabet transcription and syllable breakdown
- **Shadowing exercises**: Listen to native speaker audio, record yourself, then compare side-by-side
- **Spectrogram comparison**: Visual frequency analysis of native vs your recording using mel-scale spectrograms
- **Pitch contour overlay**: Overlaid intonation curves (F0) showing native speaker pitch pattern vs yours
- **Live microphone visualization**: Real-time waveform while recording
- **AI-generated content**: Fresh practice words and phrases generated by AI, with a shared content pool
- **Interactive vocal tract anatomy**: Diagram showing where and how English sounds are produced

## Available lessons

1. **Tricky Consonants** — /tʃ/ /dʒ/ /ʃ/ /ʒ/ /θ/ /ð/ /ŋ/ — sounds that don't exist in many languages
2. **Aspiration** — /pʰ tʰ kʰ/ — the extra puff of air on English stops
3. **American T** — 4 allophones: flap [ɾ], glottal [ʔ], released [tʰ], unreleased [t̚]
4. **Light & Dark L** — clear [l] vs velarized [ɫ] and when to use each
5. **S-endings** — /s/ vs /z/ vs /ɪz/ rules for plurals and verb conjugations
6. **Linking** — connected speech patterns: consonant-to-vowel, vowel-to-vowel linking

## Key details

- URL: https://pronun.space
- Free to use, no subscription required
- Works on mobile and desktop browsers
- Sign in with Google to save progress and generate fresh AI content
- Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- TTS via ElevenLabs (primary) with edge-tts serverless fallback (free Microsoft Edge TTS)
- Audio analysis uses wavesurfer.js (spectrograms) and pitchfinder (YIN algorithm for F0 extraction)

## Who it's for

- ESL/EFL learners at intermediate level and above
- Non-native English speakers working on American English accent
- Pronunciation class students who want extra practice
- Anyone interested in phonetics and speech analysis

## Contact

Built by Quauhtli Martinez.
